description: Model a 3D wooden stair stringer with 4 steps using a parametrically constrained 2D sketch. The profile must be a closed 11-sided shape consisting of 4 vertical risers (180 mm each), 4 horizontal treads (280 mm each), a 200 mm vertical Top Face, and a 200 mm horizontal Bottom Face, connected by an angled Back Edge. Use 'Equal Length' constraints to ensure all risers and treads are uniform. Extrude the sketch to a thickness of 40 mm. Save the model as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stair_stringer.slvs and export the 3D solid as an STL mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stair_stringer.stl.
